---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? Is your feature request related to a problem?
Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented.

## Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case
How would you use this feature? Provide a concrete example or scenario.

## Benefits
Who benefits from this feature and how?
- [ ] End users
- [ ] Developers
- [ ] System administrators
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Implementation Complexity
What's your estimate of implementation difficulty?
- [ ] Easy (few hours)
- [ ] Medium (few days)
- [ ] Hard (few weeks)
- [ ] Very Hard (major refactor)
- [ ] Not sure

## Mockups/Examples
If applicable, add mockups, screenshots, or examples from other projects.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, links, or screenshots about the feature request.

## Willingness to Contribute
Would you be willing to submit a PR for this feature?
- [ ] Yes, I can implement this
- [ ] Yes, with guidance
- [ ] No, but I can help test
- [ ] No
